name: logistics operations managers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For logistics operations managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient manual processing causes late orders. We automate invoice extraction and categorization instead of manual data entry and categorization.
problem_solved: Inefficient manual processing of shipping invoices
features: Categorization of invoices by shipping method
Summary report generation for monthly review
